channel.title: C++源码分析记录 on 技术的路上奔跑
channel.description: Recent content in C++源码分析记录 on 技术的路上奔跑

item.description: 一、shared_ptr(_Yp* __p)分析 # 1. 初始化 # 1// /usr/include/c++/12.2.0/bits/shared_ptr.h 2 3 template<typename _Tp> 4 class shared_ptr : public __shared_ptr<_Tp> 5 { 6 ... 7 public: 8 ... 9 /** 10* @brief Construct a %shared_ptr that owns the pointer @a __p. 11* @param __p A pointer that is convertible to element_type*. 12* @post use_count() == 1 && get() == __p 13* @throw std::bad_alloc, in which case @c delete @a __p is called.
